overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot circles a massive industrial wasteland complex in a video game environment, likely Cyberpunk 2077. The camera smoothly glides around a tall smoke-emitting tower surrounded by circular excavation pits and processing facilities during warm golden hour lighting, with no visible human activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial wasteland with open-pit excavations and refinery complex

agents.ego_description: piloting a drone forward toward the central industrial tower while maintaining altitude

entered.detail: tall rusted industrial tower emitting white smoke from the top
massive multi-level industrial facility with yellow structural elements
tiered circular mining excavations with concentric rings
long elevated industrial conveyor belts connecting facilities
hazy mountain silhouette on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of a desolate industrial wasteland during golden hour. The camera approaches a tall smoke-emitting tower on the left while a massive refinery complex looms on the right. Circular excavation pits and elevated conveyor belts dominate the foreground, with distant mountains visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: central tower complex with surrounding mining infrastructure

events.description: drone transitions from forward approach to circling around the central smokestack tower

agents.ego_description: circling the central tower to survey the surrounding industrial excavation site

entered.detail: rows of blue reflective solar panels in the distant wasteland

segments.scene_description: The drone begins circling the central smokestack tower, revealing the full scale of the circular excavation pits surrounding it. The large refinery complex moves out of view as the camera turns, while distant solar panel arrays become visible on the left horizon. The smoke plume drifts consistently from the tower top.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wasteland approaching distant solar facilities

events.description: drone passes the central tower and continues toward the distant solar array facilities

agents.ego_description: flying past the central tower and heading toward the distant solar installations

segments.scene_description: The drone completes its orbit and flies past the central tower, which exits the frame to the right. The circular excavation pits fall behind as the camera pushes forward toward the expansive solar panel arrays in the distance. The landscape opens up to reveal more of the barren wasteland and distant mountain ranges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial orbit around a massive industrial tower that eventually gives way to a vast, open wasteland. It begins with a wide view of a desolate refinery complex and circular excavation pits under a warm golden hour light, with the camera approaching a tall, smoke-emitting tower. As the drone begins to circle the smokestack, the refinery complex slides out of view, revealing the full scale of the surrounding pits and distant solar panel arrays on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the camera completes its orbit and flies past the tower, leaving the industrial structures behind to push forward across the barren terrain. Finally, the landscape opens up completely, centering on the expansive solar arrays and distant mountain ranges.
